name: Ham and Bean Soup with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except frozen vegetables and cabbage in the crock-pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 12 to 18 hours.
3. Turn to High and remove ham.
4. Add peas, garlic, green pepper, and cabbage.
5. Cook for 1 to 2 hours on High or until vegetables are tender.
6. Serve large bowls of this thick soup with crusty French bread.
